title: PIA IN HONG DIM DING HI

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Na thupha, te sim dih in, khat khit khat ngaih sun dih ve
Pasian in a tampi hongpiak na theive leh,
Na neek ding leh napiak ding zong hong sik lai lai aive.
Pia in minuamsa na hih lam kithei ni teh.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Pia in (hong dim ding hi)
Pia in (hong dim ding hi)
Ngahna sangin piakna ah thupha om zaw hi,
Na sum om na mun ah na lungsim om ding hi.
Pia in pia in na lungdam, nalungdam ding hi.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Meigongnu salthau um sung sathau sawh khat zong
A piak man in thupha luang a zah tampi,
Kial sung tontung sathau um sathau tawh kilawinawn lo,
Nang zong pia in Topa hoihna na mu ding hi.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: A cingh te hau semsem ven, A ciil te zawng semsem se,
Piak khiatna in it na hi, Pasian dan hi veh,
Cimawh genthei mizawngte, meigong tagah dongtuak te,
Piakna tawh it na lak in kisik kei niteh.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Piak nop loh na tawh thupha kongvangte kikhak
thei a, Hazatna leh iksik na tawh hong khem thei hi
A phalte khang sem sem ding, a it te kiam semsem ding,
Neih man a piak hilo a, phal man hizaw hi.
